A private AI job-search assistant

Apply smarter, not harder.

Paste a job once and Job Tracker researches the company, scores your fit, writes your cover letter and recruiter note, prepares you for the interview — and keeps your whole pipeline in one place. Everything runs locally on your own machine.
🎯

Page — Job Tracker · real screenshot · local & private
ready when you are
Paste a job. The rest is done.
To try it: double-click start.bat (Windows) or start.command (macOS). On first run it installs everything and opens the app. Then open ⚙ Settings, paste a free Gemini key, and start applying smarter. Your data never leaves your computer.
Click ▶ Start demo to begin. Narration plays through your browser's voice — pick another from the dropdown if you like.
